hooks.prompt:
Review the code that was just written/edited for accessibility compliance. Check for:

1. BUTTONS: All <button> elements have type="button", onKeyDown handlers for Enter/Space, aria-label, and :focus CSS with outline
2. KEYBOARD: All interactive elements are reachable via Tab, proper tabIndex management, no tab traps
3. FOCUS STATES: Visible :focus styles with outline-offset, not just hover states
4. SEMANTIC HTML: Using <button> not <div role="button">, proper labels on forms
5. MODALS: Focus traps, Escape key support, Enter/Space for actions, focus restoration
6. ARIA: aria-label on interactive elements, aria-live for announcements where needed

If violations found, list them specifically with line numbers and suggest fixes. If compliant, confirm briefly.
